notes:
🧭 Navbar Customization, Offline Access & Bug Fixes

✨ **New Features:**
- **Navbar Customization** — Position (top/bottom/left/right), auto-hide on scroll, custom glow colors, drag-to-reorder items, show/hide items with hover reveal
- **Offline Mode** — HomePage falls back to your local collection when offline, with offline banner indicator
- **Navigation Settings** — New 'Navigation' section in Settings with full navbar control

🐛 **Bug Fixes:**
- **Tauri Updater** — Fixed broken update check and install flow, removed invalid imports
- **About Icon** — Fixed broken app icon on Settings About page
- **Vault Page** — Fixed removeFromCollection and updateCollectionItem function signatures
- **Build Errors** — Resolved all TypeScript compilation errors

🎨 **Improvements:**
- **Glow Presets** — Choose from 8 glow color presets or use accent color sync
- **Hidden Nav Items** — Hidden items appear on hover like Windows taskbar
- **Vertical Nav** — Left/right nav positions with vertical layout
- **Smooth Transitions** — Auto-hide with scroll direction detection

🚀 **Version 1.3.0 Release!**
